public_functions.behavior_description: Initialize only peripherals present on TC4D7. 1) Optionally configure a system timebase using supported TC4Dx resources (e.g., WUT) if periodic tasks are required; no eGTM usage. 2) Enable the ADC module and configure TMADC in queued/polled mode: prepare a queue of required channels, initialize their configurations, and start TMADC in polled (non-interrupt) mode. 3) Configure the LED GPIO as a push-pull output and set its initial inactive level. 4) Any PWM generation for a 3-phase inverter must use TC4Dx-supported timer modules (e.g., CCU6 or GPT12) and is not configured here. NOTE: Verify the exact TMADC iLLD initialization API sequence and the TMADC configuration structure field names against the TC4Dx iLLD headers/documentation.

includes: TODO: Verify correct TC4Dx iLLD header names for TMADC and Port drivers
